productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Casual Brown Shoes
description: This stylish pair in a rounded toe box design from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It&rsquo s a perfect combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These shoes offer superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for casual wear. You can team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperLeather uppers for better comfort and durabilityStitch detailing for greater reinforcement and styleRounded toe box for more comfortElasticated inserts on the sides for easy insertion and removal of the feetPadded collar and tongue for extra comfortLogo tab on the sideTextile lining for greater comfortMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfortCushioned footbed for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceGrooves in a herringbone pattern and geometrical lugs on the outsole for better grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
